# ctyun_rabbitmq_exchanges (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10000118/10001967





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) rabbitMq实例ID

### Optional

- `name` (String) 交换器名称（模糊匹配）
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID
- `vhost` (String) vhost名称

### Read-Only

- `exchanges` (Attributes List) 交换器列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--exchanges))

<a id="nestedatt--exchanges"></a>
### Nested Schema for `exchanges`

Read-Only:

- `auto_delete` (Boolean) 是否自动删除
- `durable` (Boolean) 是否持久化
- `internal` (Boolean) 是否内置
- `name` (String) 交换器名称
- `type` (String) 交换器类型
- `vhost` (String) vhost
- `x_delayed_type` (String) 当type为x-delayed-message时有值
